channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large pothole. Caused damage to the front passenger tyre, 6th March
item.description:
Driving to cricley hill/air balloon direction from Cheltenham. Just before the lay-by opposite viewing point. Massive pothole

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leckhampton Hill, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Signs and road markings completely the wrong way around, 6th March
item.description:
When heading into Cheltenham from Smiths traffic lights, where two lanes merge into just one, the new signage and road markings direct traffic into the left hand lane, which is the lane that does not continue. Anyone following this instruction will immediately have to move out into the right lane! How on earth this wasn’t noticed by the sign writers is a mystery!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evesham Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: Pothole keeps on reoccurring., 6th March
item.description:
Mill lane. Junction with vicarage lane. Brockworth.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Vicarage Lane, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cleeve View Road - multiple potholes, 6th March
item.description:
One pothole in road entrance to Cleeve View Road from Hewlett Road. Three potholes in road adjacent to 38 Cleeve View Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hopwood Grove, Lynworth, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very large pothole on Hatherley Road, 6th March
item.description:
Opposit CLEAN laundrette

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 219, Hatherley Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 24 inch pothole occurring outside 5 Colesbourne Road, 6th March
item.description:
7 Colesbourne Road. Noticed it starting 2 weeks ago

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Colesbourne Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 6th March
item.description:
Commercial building waste, guttering empty oil containers and plaster board

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rookery Road, Innsworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking the pavement, 6th March
item.description:
Been on the pavement for over 3 weeks causing a trip hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rookery Road, Innsworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road has sunk causing a huge bump in the road, 6th March
item.description:
Going south near to the edge of the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Road, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 6th March
item.description:
In wet weather the branch rubs against the telegraph line.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littering by Highways, 6th March
item.description:
With the recent road closure you've had every opportunity to have cleared the cones that litter a vast stretch of this highway. They lie discarded and have done for many months. Most are probably no longer fit for use in many cases. What a waste of tax payers money. Please stop littering this highway and retrieve.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester Road, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: It is a single track lane and this pothole is just getting bigger that we cannot avoid, 6th March
item.description:
The issue I am talking about is outside the property quarter of the way down the lane (you can’t miss it .) To be honest, the whole lane could do with resurfacing there is that many holes down there It is taken 2 weeks to clear enough to be able to walk down there again as it’s holding so much water due to in need of some TLC.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cooks Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive pothole that has been there since it was reported in January if not before still not been marked, reporting it again in the hope GH might eventually action this if enough people reports it. Very hard to see and horrible to hit it will be causing damage to cars …., 6th March
item.description:
On Southbound carriage before turn into playing fields that whole stretch to the roundabout is in desperate need of resurfacing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several Potholes, 6th March
item.description:
I see this was reported in middle of February and no action has been taken. By the roadworks that being done on A417 through the 40mph coned section there are several big and getting bigger potholes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A417, Cowley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shopping trolley., 6th March
item.description:
I know what you’re probably going to say – report it on Trolleywise. But they only collect certain shopping trolleys, not every trolley. The trolley situation around here is really frustrating, and the only reason I report it is because we’re encouraged to report things like fly-tipping. In reality, though, the shops should probably take more responsibility for their trolleys. Sorry for reporting another one, but I do care about the area. When things are tidy and clean, it really does make a difference.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Tewkesbury Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped fridge, 6th March
item.description:
Someone has dumped a fridge at the left hand entrance to Whitehart Street on the grass.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, White Hart Street, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement damaged, 6th March
item.description:
I reported a problem under Web Reference: 8981700 Enquiry Number: 22105244 Today someone came to assess the issues BUT THEY ASSESSED ONLY THE DAMAGE AT THE PEDESTRIAN GATE, NOT THE ONE AT THE DRIVEWAY GATE. Our tyres are getting damaged by the collapsed pavement when entering the porperty as it has broken down completely. Please do something about this and don't send out people who are not doing their job properly.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 6th March
item.description:
CWPH 900 X 900 X 95mm ROAD CLOSURE MARKED X (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
EMERGENCY 2HR CWPH 15DB 900 X 900 X 95mm MARKED X (CW6 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 6th March
